summary: Excellent soundboard recording with a tight Dead backing Dylan; standout moments include Jerry’s pedal‑steel on “I Want You”, “Baby Blue” and a grooving slower‑shuffle “Highway 61”.
review: The crowd‑sourced soundboard capture is praised as one of the highest‑quality Dylan/Dead uploads, delivering clear, crisp audio that lets listeners hear every nuance. Musically the show shines – the band stays tight, Jerry Garcia’s pedal‑steel adds a special flavor, and songs like “I Want You”, “Baby Blue” and a laid‑back “Highway 61” are highlighted as highlights, despite a few dissenting opinions about Dylan’s tuning.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviewers (10 out of 13) give 4‑5 stars and praise both the performance and recording quality; a few low scores focus on Dylan’s vocals rather than the audio or musicianship, yielding an overall strong but not unanimous endorsement.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call it the highest‑quality Dylan/Dead upload, noting crisp, clear sound with no reported dropouts or mix problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as energetic from the start (“cooking” with “I Want You”), with a tight rhythm section and Jerry’s pedal‑steel adding unique color; overall flow is praised as magical and well‑grooved.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His pedal‑steel/slide work is repeatedly highlighted as a treat and adds special texture to the show.
